nodes.title: Fuzzy Reconciler MVP prototype (demo + screenshots)
nodes.description: Vertical-slice MVP from OpenSpec + README handoff: engine, demo data, FastAPI, Svelte UI (ingest/config/results/map/detail/export), screenshots. Source: openspec/specs/fuzzy-reconciler/spec.md and README Development Handoff Plan.

nodes.title: Project scaffolding (src layout, Makefile, packaging)
nodes.acceptance: src/fuzzy_reconciler package installs; make targets documented; hatchling build works

nodes.title: Pydantic models: Entity, MatchConfig, MatchPair, CompareResult
nodes.acceptance: models cover core schema + config weights/thresholds + classification enum

nodes.title: Matching engine: blocking, scoring, classification
nodes.acceptance: haversine geo + rapidfuzz name + attr Jaccard + temporal decay; rules for exact/strong/temporal_variant/spatial_proximity_candidate/weak/unmatched; unit tests for temporal + spatial scenarios

nodes.title: Sample data generator + small_demo fixtures + ground truth
nodes.acceptance: fixtures/small_demo.json with intentional exact, temporal_variant (5-8), spatial_proximity (4-6), uniques; scripts/generate_sample_data.py; ground_truth.json for tests

nodes.title: FastAPI: /demo/sample, /ingest, /compare, /presets
nodes.acceptance: OpenAPI docs live; demo returns both lists; compare returns summary + matches with score breakdowns; presets include POI Strict / Facility Loose / Sensor Temporal

nodes.title: Svelte 5 + Vite frontend shell + design tokens
nodes.acceptance: frontend/ builds; proxies API; brand-forward ops reconcilation aesthetic (not purple/cream AI defaults)

nodes.title: Ingestion screen + Load Demo Data
nodes.acceptance: Load Demo Data populates List A/B previews; Continue to Configuration works

nodes.title: Configuration panel + presets + Run Comparison
nodes.acceptance: Sliders for geo/name/attr/date/weights; preset chips; Run Fuzzy Comparison calls /compare

nodes.title: Results dashboard: KPIs + table + Leaflet map sync
nodes.acceptance: Color-coded KPI cards; filterable table; map layers by classification; row/marker sync; polylines for pairs

nodes.title: Detail reconciliation panel + decisions + master export
nodes.acceptance: Side-by-side fields, score bars, Confirm/Temporal/Distinct actions, notes; reconciled master + CSV export with _match_* columns

nodes.title: Capture docs/screenshots for demo handoff
nodes.acceptance: docs/screenshots/ has ingestion, config, results+map, detail temporal, detail spatial, master/export; README references images

nodes.title: Makefile + README quickstart polish for one-command demo
nodes.acceptance: make dev starts backend+frontend; README quick start works end-to-end in <30s with demo data
